files.patch:
@@ -26,2 +26,2 @@
- * @test
- * @summary Run shell with -XX:+StressWXHealing. This tests most of
+ * @test id=TraceWXHealing
+ * @summary Run shell with -XX:+StressWXHealing and -XX:+TraceWXHealing. This tests most of
@@ -35,1 +35,1 @@
- * @run main TestWXHealing
+ * @run main TestWXHealing traceWXHealing
@@ -38,0 +38,11 @@
+/*
+ * @test id=No-TraceWXHealing
+ * @summary Run shell with -XX:+StressWXHealing. This tests most of
+ * the triggers for WX mode.
+ * @requires os.family == "mac"
+ * @requires os.arch == "aarch64"
+ * @library /test/lib
+ * @compile WXHealing.java
+ * @build jtreg.SkippedException
+ * @run main TestWXHealing
+ */
@@ -47,2 +58,17 @@
-        String[] opts = {"-XX:+UnlockDiagnosticVMOptions",
-                         "-XX:+TraceWXHealing", "-XX:+StressWXHealing", "WXHealing"};
+        String[] opts;
+        boolean traceWXHealing = args.length > 0 && args[0].equals("traceWXHealing");
+        // pass -XX:+TraceWXHealing only when instructed to do so
+        if (traceWXHealing) {
+            opts = new String[]{
+                    "-XX:+UnlockDiagnosticVMOptions",
+                    "-XX:+TraceWXHealing",
+                    "-XX:+StressWXHealing",
+                    "WXHealing"
+            };
+        } else {
+            opts = new String[]{
+                    "-XX:+UnlockDiagnosticVMOptions",
+                    "-XX:+StressWXHealing",
+                    "WXHealing"
+            };
+        }
@@ -55,1 +81,7 @@
-            throw new RuntimeException("no output generated by -XX:+TraceWXHealing");
+            throw new RuntimeException("no output generated by WXHealing application");
+        }
+        if (!traceWXHealing) {
+            // if -XX:+TraceWXHealing wasn't enabled, then this test merely
+            // verifies that the java application launched with -XX:+StressWXHealing
+            // exited normally.
+            return;
@@ -57,0 +89,1 @@
+        // verify the output generated by -XX:+TraceWXHealing
